# Proofpoint

## RSA 2026
*   **Booth number and hall:** N-6163, Moscone North Expo Hall
*   **Any updated booth info from the conference floor:** Proofpoint is showcasing live product demos, dynamic 15-minute theater sessions, and offering giveaways. The focus is on protecting people, data, and AI across email, cloud, and collaboration tools. Key session topics include "AI Is Redefining Insider Risk. Are You Ready?" and "Securing the Agentic Workspace: From Humans to Agents." [
